title: Git init, .gitignore, create private GitHub repo
description: Initialize git repository, create .gitignore for C++/macOS, create private repo on GitHub, push initial commit.

title: Update README with roadmap and architecture
description: Expand README with architecture diagram, roadmap phases, MCP tools table, build instructions, and installation guide.

title: Create issues.jsonl tracking system
description: Create issues.jsonl file to track all bugs, features, plans, and changes. Establish tracking conventions.

title: Scaffold project structure
description: Create Makefile, src/ directory, download nlohmann/json header, create source files (main.cpp, mcp_handler.h/cpp, midi_bridge.h/cpp).

title: Implement JSON-RPC/MCP protocol handler
description: Implement MCP protocol over stdio: initialize handshake, tools/list, tools/call dispatch. JSON-RPC 2.0 request parsing and response formatting.

title: Implement CoreMIDI integration
description: Wrap CoreMIDI API: enumerate sources/destinations, send messages, receive with FIFO buffering, port open/close lifecycle.

title: Wire up main entry point and build
description: Connect MCP handler and MIDI bridge in main.cpp. Stdio read loop, signal handling, clean shutdown. Verified build and smoke test with initialize, tools/list, and list_devices.

title: SDK include path workaround for broken CommandLineTools
description: C++ stdlib headers missing from /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/include/c++/v1/. Fixed by adding -isysroot and explicit SDK include path in Makefile.

title: Send MIDI messages (note on/off, CC, program change)
description: Test and validate send_message tool with real hardware. Verify note on/off, CC, and program change messages.

title: Receive MIDI with FIFO buffering
description: Test open_port/read_buffer/close_port with real MIDI input. Validate FIFO behavior and buffer management.

title: Error handling and input validation
description: Validate tool arguments (byte ranges 0-255, valid device IDs). Return clear error messages for invalid input.

title: SysEx support with safety guardrails
description: Support SysEx messages with safeguards against accidental factory resets or destructive operations.

title: Virtual MIDI port creation
description: Allow creating virtual MIDI ports so other apps can send/receive through the MCP server.

title: Device hot-plug detection
description: Detect MIDI device connect/disconnect events and notify the client or update device list.

title: Register as Claude Code MCP and end-to-end test
description: Add to claude_mcp_settings.json and test full round-trip from Claude Code conversation.
